title: "Creeped out by her face": Erika Kirk’s eerie reaction on podcast triggers internet frenzy over Candace Owens remark
summary_full: Erika Kirk is facing online backlash after a viral clip from The Charlie Kirk Show showed her making remarks about Candace Owens. Viewers focused on her facial expressions, calling them “unsettling,” while others criticized her statement about dehumanization. Social media reactions have been mixed, with some questioning her demeanor and others defending her amid ongoing scrutiny and intense online debate.
